<!-- Clearly describe the feature you'd like to see -->

<!-- What problem or limitation does this address? -->

<!-- How would you like this to work? -->

<!-- Have you thought of other approaches? -->

<!-- When would this feature be useful? Provide examples -->

## Implementation Notes
<!-- Any thoughts on how this could be implemented? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add screenshots, mockups, or other context -->
